mapper.select:
select a.id company_id, a.company_name,
a.match_user_id, a.match_user_name matchUserName,
ROUND(IFNULL(b.tradeNumber, 0), 2) tradeNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(b.totalTradeAmout, 0), 2) totalTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(b.totalTradeNumber, 0), 2) totalTradeNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(b.totalTradeAmout, 0) / IFNULL(b.tradeNumber, 0), 0), 2) averageTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(c.margin_amount, 0), 2) totalMarginAmount,
ROUND(IFNULL(f.iousNumber, 0), 2) iousNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(f.iousTradeNumber, 0), 2) iousTradeNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(f.iousTradeAmount, 0), 2) iousTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(f.iousTradeAmount, 0) / IFNULL(f.iousNumber, 0), 0), 2) iousAverageTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(f.iousMarginAmount, 0), 2) iousMarginAmount,
ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(b.totalCreditCycle, 0) / IFNULL(b.tradeNumber, 0), 0), 2) averageCreditCycle, ROUND(IFNULL(c.overdueNumber, 0), 2) overdueNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(c.totalOverdueAmount, 0), 2) totalOverdueAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(c.breach_days, 0) / IFNULL(c.overdueNumber, 0), 0), 2) averageOverdueDay, ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(c.overdueNumber, 0) / IFNULL(b.tradeNumber, 0), 0), 2) overdueRate, ROUND(IFNULL(c.breach_amount, 0), 2) totalInterestAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(c.receive_breach_amount, 0), 2) totalReceiveInterestAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(a.total_credit_amount, 0), 2) totalCreditAmount, ROUND((IFNULL(a.total_credit_amount, 0) - IFNULL(a.used_credit_amount, 0) - IFNULL(a.approve_credit_amount, 0)), 2) availableCreditAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(d.breachNumber, 0), 2) breachNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(d.totalTotalBreachAmount, 0), 2) totalBreachAmount,
ROUND(IFNULL(g.matchNumber, 0), 2) matchNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(g.matchTradeNumber, 0), 2) matchTradeNumber, ROUND(IFNULL(g.matchTradeAmount, 0), 2) matchTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(IFNULL(g.matchTradeAmount, 0) / IFNULL(g.matchNumber, 0), 0), 2) matchAverageTradeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(g.matchMarginAmount, 0), 2) matchMarginAmount
from t_bs_company a
left join ( select b.company_id, count(b.id) as tradeNumber, sum(b.total_amount) totalTradeAmout, sum(b.total_number) totalTradeNumber, sum(b.credit_cycle) totalCreditCycle from t_ctr_contract b where b.contract_type = 'S' and b.contract_status != 'C' and b.status = 'D'
AND DATE_FORMAT(b.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(b.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by b.company_id) b on b.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) overdueNumber, sum(a.total_amount) totalOverdueAmount, sum(a.breach_days) breach_days, sum(a.breach_amount) breach_amount, sum(a.receive_breach_amount) receive_breach_amount, sum(tbs.margin_amount) margin_amount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.breach_days > 0 and tbs.budget_status != '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id) c on c.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) breachNumber, sum(a.breach_amount) totalTotalBreachAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and tbs.budget_status = '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) d on d.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) iousNumber, sum(a.total_number) iousTradeNumber, sum(a.total_amount) iousTradeAmount, sum(b.margin_amount) iousMarginAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement b on a.id = b.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.settlement_type is not null
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) f on f.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) matchNumber, sum(a.total_number) matchTradeNumber, sum(a.total_amount) matchTradeAmount, sum(b.margin_amount) matchMarginAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement b on a.id = b.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.settlement_type is null
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) g on g.company_id = a.id left join ( select max(breach_days) maxBreachDay,a.company_id from t_ctr_contract a where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) h on h.company_id = a.id where a.enable_flg = true and a.enterprise_id = 44
ORDER BY a.id ASC
ORDER BY a.id DESC
ORDER BY a.id DESC

select sum(x.tradeNumber) totalTradeNumber, ROUND(sum(x.totalTradeNumber),2) totalTotalTradeNumber, sum(x.totalTradeAmount) totalTotalTradeAmount, sum(x.totalMarginAmount) totalTotalMarginAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.totalTradeAmount) / sum(x.tradeNumber), 0), 2) aveAverageTradeAmount,
sum(x.iousNumber) totalIousNumber, sum(x.iousTradeNumber) totalIousTradeNumber, sum(x.iousTradeAmount) totalIousTradeAmount, sum(x.iousMarginAmount) totalIousMarginAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.iousTradeAmount) / sum(x.iousNumber), 0), 2) aveIousAverageTradeAmount,
ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.creditCycle) / sum(x.tradeNumber), 0),2) aveAverageCreditCycle, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.overdueNumber) / sum(x.tradeNumber),0),2) aveOverdueNumber, sum(totalOverdueAmount) totalTotalOverdueAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.breachDays) / sum(x.overdueNumber),0),2) aveAverageOverdueDay, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.overdueNumber) / sum(x.tradeNumber),0),2) aveOverdueRate, sum(x.totalInterestAmount) totalTotalInterestAmount, sum(x.totalReceiveInterestAmount) totalTotalReceiveInterestAmount, sum(x.totalCreditAmount) totalTotalCreditAmount, sum(x.availableCreditAmount) availableTotalCreditAmount, sum(x.breachNumber) totalBreachNumber, sum(x.totalBreachAmount) totalTotalBreachAmount,
sum(x.matchNumber) totalMatchNumber, sum(x.matchTradeNumber) totalMatchTradeNumber, sum(x.matchTradeAmount) totalMatchTradeAmount, sum(x.matchMarginAmount) totalMatchMarginAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(sum(x.matchTradeAmount) / sum(x.matchNumber), 0), 2) aveMatchAverageTradeAmount
from ( select IFNULL(b.tradeNumber, 0) tradeNumber, IFNULL(b.totalTradeAmout, 0) totalTradeAmount, IFNULL(b.totalTradeNumber, 0) totalTradeNumber, IFNULL(c.margin_amount, 0) totalMarginAmount,
IFNULL(f.iousNumber, 0) iousNumber, IFNULL(f.iousTradeNumber, 0) iousTradeNumber, IFNULL(f.iousTradeAmount, 0) iousTradeAmount, IFNULL(f.iousMarginAmount, 0) iousMarginAmount,
IFNULL(b.totalCreditCycle, 0) creditCycle,
IFNULL(c.overdueNumber, 0) overdueNumber, IFNULL(c.totalOverdueAmount, 0) totalOverdueAmount, IFNULL(c.breach_days, 0) breachDays, IFNULL(c.breach_amount, 0) totalInterestAmount, IFNULL(c.receive_breach_amount, 0) totalReceiveInterestAmount, IFNULL(a.total_credit_amount, 0) totalCreditAmount, (IFNULL(a.total_credit_amount, 0) - IFNULL(a.used_credit_amount, 0) - IFNULL(a.approve_credit_amount, 0)) availableCreditAmount, IFNULL(d.breachNumber, 0) breachNumber, IFNULL(d.totalTotalBreachAmount, 0) totalBreachAmount,
IFNULL(g.matchNumber, 0) matchNumber, IFNULL(g.matchTradeNumber, 0) matchTradeNumber, IFNULL(g.matchTradeAmount, 0) matchTradeAmount, IFNULL(g.matchMarginAmount, 0) matchMarginAmount
from t_bs_company a
left join ( select b.company_id, count(b.id) as tradeNumber, sum(b.total_amount) totalTradeAmout, sum(b.total_number) totalTradeNumber, sum(b.credit_cycle) totalCreditCycle from t_ctr_contract b where b.contract_type = 'S' and b.status = 'D'
AND DATE_FORMAT(b.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(b.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by b.company_id) b on b.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) overdueNumber, sum(a.total_amount) totalOverdueAmount, sum(a.breach_days) breach_days, sum(a.breach_amount) breach_amount, sum(a.receive_breach_amount) receive_breach_amount, sum(tbs.margin_amount) margin_amount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.breach_days > 0 and tbs.budget_status != '3'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id) c on c.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) breachNumber, sum(a.breach_amount) totalTotalBreachAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement tbs on a.id = tbs.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and tbs.budget_status = '3'
group by a.company_id ) d on d.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) iousNumber, sum(a.total_number) iousTradeNumber, sum(a.total_amount) iousTradeAmount, sum(b.margin_amount) iousMarginAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement b on a.id = b.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.settlement_type is not null
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) f on f.company_id = a.id left join ( select a.company_id, count(a.id) matchNumber, sum(a.total_number) matchTradeNumber, sum(a.total_amount) matchTradeAmount, sum(b.margin_amount) matchMarginAmount from t_ctr_contract a left join t_budget_settlement b on a.id = b.sell_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.settlement_type is null
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) g on g.company_id = a.id left join ( select max(breach_days) maxBreachDay,a.company_id from t_ctr_contract a where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_status != 'C' and a.contract_type = 'S'
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{timeTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
group by a.company_id ) h on h.company_id = a.id where a.enable_flg = true and a.enterprise_id = 44
) x
